CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the national performance database. Do not change this field or manually update the data in it.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This box will automatically be checked if there are any Monitoring Events associated with this Service File with a Type of "Notice of Foreclosure Proceedings" or "Program Foreclosure Initiated." Do not manually update this box.
CustomField.label: Ever in Foreclosure
